revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十七]][[zh:六月十七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十七]][[zh:六月十七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十七]][[zh:六月十七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十七]][[zh:六月十七]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 17|qq=June 17}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|July 11|en|July 11|qid=Q2701|lt=July 11|1=July 11}} , {{ill|1854|en|1854|qid=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} ) – {{ill|Matthew C. Perry|en|Matthew C. Perry|qid=Q61855|lt=Matthew Perry|1=Matthew C. Perry}} signed the "{{ill|Ryūkyū–US Treaty of Amity|ja|琉米修好条約|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryūkyū–US Treaty of Amity|1=Convention between the Lew Chew Islands and the United States of America|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5369194}} " with the {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|en|Ryukyu Kingdom|qid=Q28025|lt=Ryukyu Kingdom|1=Ryukyu Kingdom}} . * Year 2 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 25|en|July 25|qid=Q2720|lt=July 25|1=July 25}} , {{ill|1869|en|1869|qid=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} ) – The four domains of {{ill|Satsuma|en|Satsuma|qid=Q227481|lt=Satsuma|1=Satsuma}} , {{ill|長州|en|長州|qid=Q122461666|lt=Chōshū|1=長州}} , {{ill|Tosa|ja|土佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tosa|1=Q10927605|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10927605}} , and {{ill|Hizen|ja|肥前|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hizen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 肥前国|1=Hizen Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q906926}} petitioned for {{ill|Hanseki Hōkan|ja|版籍奉還|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanseki Hōkan|1=hanseki hōkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q711993}} (return of lands and registers to the emperor). Other domains followed suit. * Meiji 2 (Gregorian calendar July 25, 1869) – An imperial edict declared that court nobles and feudal lords would be referred to as {{ill|Kazoku|en|Kazoku|qid=Q241734|lt=Kazoku|1=Kazoku}} (the new nobility class).
== Births ==
== Deaths == * Year 16 of {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 26|en|July 26|qid=Q2723|lt=July 26|1=July 26}} , {{ill|1611|en|1611|qid=Q6768|lt=1611|1=1611}} ) – {{ill|Horio Yoshiharu|en|Horio Yoshiharu|qid=Q8190645|lt=Horio Yoshiharu|1=Horio Yoshiharu}} , daimyō and first lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|en|Matsue Domain|qid=Q1017072|lt=Matsue Domain|1=Matsue Domain}} (b. {{ill|1544|en|1544|qid=Q6525|lt=1544|1=1544}} ) * Year 4 of {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 6|en|August 6|qid=Q2787|lt=August 6|1=August 6}} , {{ill|1857|en|1857|qid=Q7680|lt=1857|1=1857}} ) – {{ill|Abe Masahiro|en|Abe Masahiro|qid=Q1070088|lt=Abe Masahiro|1=Abe Masahiro}} , late Edo-period {{ill|Rōjū|en|Rōjū|qid=Q1196812|lt=Rōjū|1=Rōjū}} and lord of the {{ill|Fukuyama Domain|en|Fukuyama Domain|qid=Q909278|lt=Fukuyama Domain (Bingo Province)|1=Fukuyama Domain}} (b. {{ill|1819|en|1819|qid=Q6967|lt=1819|1=1819}} ) * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 1|en|August 1|qid=Q2788|lt=August 1|1=August 1}} , {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} ) – {{ill|Mitsukuri Genpo|en|Mitsukuri Genpo|qid=Q6532054|lt=Mitsukuri Genpo|1=Mitsukuri Genpo}} , Rangaku (Dutch studies) scholar (b. {{ill|1799|en|1799|qid=Q7827|lt=1799|1=1799}} )
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kangen-sai|ja|管絃祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangen-sai|1=Kangensai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11603286}} at {{ill|Itsukushima Shrine|en|Itsukushima Shrine|qid=Q191763|lt=Itsukushima Shrine|1=Itsukushima Shrine}}
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|16|6|18|5|17|7|6|0617|qq=}}
